character: Homeowner in Switzerland or Europe who leaves home for work, travel, or a second property—and wants it to look lived-in, not empty.

problem.external: Break-ins, visibly empty homes, especially during daytime hours.
problem.internal: Anxiety when away, guilt leaving family, hyper-vigilance at the door.
problem.philosophical: You should not need a break-in to deserve peace of mind at home.

guide.empathy: We know the knot in your stomach when you lock the door and walk away.
guide.authority: Swiss-engineered AI presence simulation. 9W. No cameras. No microphones.

plan: Set a schedule or let Kevin activate when you leave.
Live protected—your home never looks empty.
failure: A break-in costs more than valuables—you lose the feeling that home is your safe place.
success: Someone is always home. Travel, work late, and sleep without rehearsing worst cases.
oneLiner: When you are away, Kevin uses Swiss AI to simulate real human presence with light, shadow, and sound—so your home stays visibly lived-in and burglars move on.
metaDescription: Kevin is Swiss AI presence simulation for your home—light, shadow, and sound that make it look lived-in when you are away. Prevention, not reaction.
productClaimsNotes: Geo/scheduling and on-device simulation copy approved for editorial use; no police or 97% claims; daytime burglary angle used qualitatively without unsourced statistics.
